description: Composition Dark blue denims made of 100% cotton, has yellow thread detailing, two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back and a zipper fly Fitting Regular Wash care Dry clean or machine wash separately in cold water as colour will bleed Use a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Dry flat inside out in shade Iron on reverse at medium setting only Get your little one up and about in a pair of jeans from Levi's that play as hard as he does. Team this with a white tee and comfy shoes when you take him out the next time. The soft cotton fabric will keep him feeling fresh and comfortable all day long, while he makes the most of his day out with you.
